Hero.tagline: Capturing timeless moments with artistic vision. Every frame tells a story, every photo preserves a memory.

Gallery.title: Selected Work
Gallery.subtitle: Explore my work across different photography disciplines. Click on any category to view the full collection.

misc.name: Miscellaneous
misc.description: A variety of subjects and styles

About.title: The Artist Behind the Lens
About.bio1: With over a decade of experience in professional photography, I've dedicated my craft to capturing the essence of every moment. My approach combines technical precision with artistic vision, creating images that transcend the ordinary.
About.bio2: Whether it's the intimate emotions of a wedding day, the dynamic energy of a corporate event, or the subtle beauty of a portrait session, I bring the same level of passion and attention to detail to every project.
About.bio3: Based in Europe, I work with clients worldwide, bringing stories to life through carefully composed frames and thoughtful post-processing that enhances without overwhelming.

Pricing.title: Photography Packages
Pricing.subtitle: Select the package that best suits your needs. Custom packages available upon request.
Pricing.included1: Professional skin retouching and subtle body refinement across all delivered images
Pricing.included2: Carefully curated selection with precise color grading and correction
Pricing.customCta: Have specific requirements? Let us create a tailored package perfectly suited to your project.

portrait.name: Portrait Session
portrait.description: Individual portraits, professional headshots, or small-scale product photography.
portrait.feature1: 1-2 hour session at a mutually agreed location and time
portrait.feature2: Relaxed atmosphere for natural, authentic expressions
portrait.feature3: Tailored styling to match your vision
portrait.feature4: Full curation, editing, and retouching of all captured images
portrait.feature5: Final images delivered within 7 business days

couple.name: Couple & Family
couple.description: Ideal for couples, families, engagement sessions, or milestone celebrations.
couple.feature1: 1-2 hour session at a mutually agreed location and time
couple.feature2: Collaborative creative direction if you have specific ideas
couple.feature3: Professional guidance with mood boards and concepts if needed
couple.feature4: Complete curation, editing, and retouching of the full session
couple.feature5: Final images delivered within 7 business days

event.name: Event Coverage
event.description: Concerts, performances, weddings, ceremonies, and special occasions.
event.feature1: Documentation of key moments and distinguished guests
event.feature2: Comprehensive coverage throughout the entire event
event.feature3: Creative storytelling through candid and composed shots
event.feature4: Full curation, editing, and retouching of all deliverables
event.feature5: Final images delivered within 10 business days

interior.name: Interior & Real Estate
interior.description: Property listings, commercial spaces, offices, and architectural photography.
interior.feature1: Multiple angles with professional lighting and composition
interior.feature3: Final images delivered within 7 business days
interior.feature4: Custom pricing available based on project scope

Contact.title: Let's Work Together
Contact.subtitle: Ready to create something beautiful? Get in touch to discuss your project. I typically respond within 24 hours.
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project, event date, location, and any specific requirements...
